title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Cancel
scenario: Cancel button on Login dialog returns user to Account screen with Login and Share Data buttons still visible
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (App Settings) to open the side menu.
expected: Login dialog closes, user returns to the Account screen, and the Log in and Share Data buttons remain visible.
